overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial facility interior. The character walks through metal-grated corridors, passes NPCs, examines a large window revealing exterior machinery, and approaches a reception desk.

wall-mounted board with papers and notices

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial facility room with metal grating floors and dark wall panels. A seated NPC is visible to the right as the character approaches and turns left into a side corridor.

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a corridor featuring a prominent red bench and potted plants on the left. A large industrial window becomes visible at the end of the hall, showing exterior machinery.

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the large window and observes the massive exterior pipes and machinery. After a moment, the character turns right toward a reception desk area visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a reception desk with a computer terminal and filing cabinets. An NPC is seated at the desk working, and abstract artwork hangs on the wall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from narrow corridors to an open reception area. It begins with the character walking across metal grating floors and passing a seated NPC before turning left into a side corridor. As the character proceeds, the environment shifts to include a red bench and potted plants, leading toward a large industrial window that reveals massive exterior pipes and machinery. The scene then opens up as the character turns away from the window and moves toward a reception desk equipped with a computer terminal and filing cabinets. Finally, the camera settles on an NPC working at the desk beneath a piece of abstract wall art.
